name: Curried Shrimp and Macaroni Salad
recipeIngredient: 500 g small shrimp (cleaned, deveined and cooked)
150 g small sea shell pasta, cooked.
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the curry powder into the mayonnaise.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to a large bowl and toss with the curried mayonnaise.
3. Chill for 1-2 hours.
